ion-button-style md button button-round button-solid ion-activatable ion-focusable hydrated

reviewSummary.summary: The draft captures the core login controls but contains duplicate password elements, weak semantic naming, missing navigation and validation elements required by the workflow, and decorative noise that should be removed before downstream automation generation.

issues.message: Two separate elements represent the same password input control using different DOM layers and duplicate names.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep only the native actionable password input with locator id=ion-input-1 and remove the wrapper ion-input element with id=password.

issues.message: The element name 'password' is too generic and inconsistent with the approved semantic naming style.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename the retained password element to 'password_textbox'.

issues.message: The password control is classified as a generic textbox even though the field type is password and masking behavior is business-significant.
issues.suggested_fix: Classify the retained password element as type 'password'.

issues.message: The background container is decorative layout content and does not provide reusable automation value.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the background_content element from the approved page model.

issues.message: Back button required by workflow navigation expectations and approved manual tests is missing from the draft artifact.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a semantically named back_button element using a stable locator.

issues.message: Home button required by workflow navigation expectations and approved manual tests is missing from the draft artifact.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a semantically named home_button element using a stable locator.

issues.message: The workflow explicitly validates generic failed authentication behavior, but no authentication error or failed message element is present in the reviewed page model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a reusable generic_failed_message validation element with a stable text-based locator.

issues.message: The sign in button locator depends entirely on visible text and may become brittle if button text changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a stable id, aria-label, data-testid, or automation attribute if available; otherwise retain current locator as fallback.

approved_elements.description: Navigation control that returns the user to the Home page.

approved_elements.name: generic_failed_message
approved_elements.description: Generic authentication failure message displayed for rejected login attempts.
